reason: IMPRECISION IN RECOVERY CLAIM: The node says 'This is the content of Weis-Shirokov Corollary 7 for the quantum case.' However, Weis-Shirokov Corollary 7 (J. Convex Anal. 28(3), 2021) is a GENERAL result about compact convex sets with face dimension gaps, not specifically about B(H). What node 1.9.4 actually recovers is the SPECIALIZATION of Cor 7 to the specific compact convex set S(B(H)). The claim should say 'This recovers the specialization of Weis-Shirokov Corollary 7 to the quantum state space S(B(H))' or 'This is the B(H) instance of Weis-Shirokov Corollary 7.' The current phrasing could be read as claiming to recover the full generality of Cor 7, which this node does not do (it only treats B(H) and C(X)).
